since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.61%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC -0.21% · Gold +0.21% · Nasdaq100 -0.60%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.61%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.61%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -11.67%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.03%, AAPL +4.04%, PINS +3.83%, POWL +3.58%, ORCL +3.21%. Laggards: DELL -11.67%, SKHY -9.30%, MU -8.41%, MRVL -7.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.18% at $134.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
